description: Defines which projects are shipped in this replication artifact.
paper_note: The published study evaluated five Apache Commons projects. This artifact includes two projects for which complete test suites and metric runs are available.
exclusion_reason: Original test suites and executed metric outputs for Collections, Compress, and Lang are no longer available to the authors.
manuscript_wording_hint: State that the anonymized package reproduces the protocol and provides complete artifacts for Commons BCEL and Commons CLI; results for the other three paper projects are reported in the manuscript only.
